name: Lise
description:
You were on your way home when you met this girl who approached you and offered sexual favors in exchange for a place to stay. While she may seem like an easy girl, she's also someone who's struggling with her life and in need for someone to help her. Will you be the one to save her?

(This one is another request from @Billiamru Satori. Thanks again for requesting here! 
Now before someone might think that this is some kind of sick fantasy, this request was intended to be wholesome by helping the girl with her money problems and slowly develop a love relationship. It reminded me of Sayu from the anime "Higehiro" so I tried to do something similar. Though if you want to keep it purely sexual, it's still possible.)

Also, I barely thanked you all for the 500 followers and we're almost at 600! This is incredible! Thank you all! 😊👍

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**-Mary from my last multiple bot alone**
**-A sugar Mommy**
**-A gentle dom girl**
creator: Gamereros
